file-name: XC545656-Pimpelmees 20200414-02a (roepjes terwijl hij mij Dead Cat plukt).mp3
rmk: These calls were given during the plucking of the hairs from my dead cat! I cut the plucking sounds out but at the end you can hear how they sound. Sounds like grazing. The Blue Tit was collecting the hairs for his nest.

loc: Zuidoost Singelsgracht e.o., Den Haag, ZH
rmk: In front of nesting box. One hour before sunrise.  Recording distance c. 2.5 m. Same bird as XC265708.

loc: Zuidoost Singelsgracht e.o., Den Haag, ZH
rmk:
Knocking and scratching(?) in nesting box. According to Birds of the Western Palearctic, male may tap at walls of hole when female in sight, but this one most of the time seems to be alone when doing this. This is going on for some six weeks now, many times a day, for long periods of time. I did'n take a look yet to see if there is any damage (or improvement).
Recording distance first part 20 cm, second part 1.5 m.

loc: Zuidoost Singelsgracht e.o., Den Haag, ZH
rmk: Small talk of two birds at feeding station. 0:08 is antagonistic. Recording distance 1-2 m [ul141004]

mic: Telinga Parabolic Kit - Clippy XLR EM272 Stereo Microphone

rmk: Huge flock migrating.

Eurasian Blue Tit (Cyanistes caeruleus) making very soft sounds in between its typical 'ringing sounds' (e.g. between 00:12 and 00:17).
This recording starts with a Greenfinch in the background (making 'oystercatcher' kind of sounds). A Great Tit and Finch can also be heard further away.
I found this an unusual song which I coould'nt remember to have heard before.
Habitat: green garden in a suburban area.

file-name: XC326174-Pimpelmezen, kuikens in weidepaal, Zwartebroek 080616 1131 uur.mp3
rmk:
Loud and clear. 
Recorded directly at the nesting site

The bird was sitting on the lower branches of a tree (at about 4 meters height), in a public garden near the city centre of Utrecht. It was singing in a sunny interval during a cold day of changeable weather, with hail and rain. No modifications were made to the recording. XC314012 was made on the exact same location a few hours earlier.

loc: Poelhuis Boerderijcamping (near  Winterswijk Meddo), Winterswijk, Gelderland
rmk: Deze opname is niet aangepast.

Deze opname is niet aangepast. De biotoop bestaat uit een boerderij met veel bomen en laag open loofhout, een visvijver, poelen, een dijk en een kampeerterrein, omgeven door: akkers en weiden, loofbos en naaldbos, boerderijen. This recording has not been edited. The biotope consists of a farm with many trees and low open deciduous wood, a fish pond, pools, a dike and a camping site, surrounded by: fields and meadows, deciduous and coniferous forest, farms.
